daily.today_energy: Mercury's whispering something real about authenticity today. Your grounded energy is magnetic rn—people are drawn to your no-bs approach. Trust the quiet knowing building inside you.
daily.love: If you're coupled up, a vulnerable conversation could shift everything. Single? Someone's noticing your vibe from afar. Either way, showing up as yourself is the whole love language today.
daily.career: Your practical magic is stronger than usual. That project or idea you've been sitting on? The universe is signaling it's go-time. Your ability to execute what others just dream about slaps.
daily.health: Your body's asking for grounding rituals—maybe a walk, stretching, or something tactile. Your nervous system craves stability. Honor that whisper. Rest isn't laziness; it's strategy.

weekly.overview: This week's cosmic energy is all about authenticity, Cap. Venus is nudging you to show up as your real self, not the polished version everyone expects. Trust the vibe shifts—they're redirecting you toward what actually matters.
weekly.love: Someone's been noticing your efforts more than you realize. Whether single or coupled, this is a moment to be vulnerable about what you actually want. The universe rewards honesty rn, so speak your truth without the armor.
weekly.career: Your ideas are sharper than usual, but don't sleep on collaboration. A conversation with someone unexpected could spark something real. The energy says: contribute your perspective, then stay open to how others build on it.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for more intentional movement and rest—not punishment, just presence. Try something that feels good rather than obligatory. Even 10 minutes of genuine self-care beats forcing a rigid routine.
